title: ReservationExpiredEvent
description: Published by Inventory.ReservationExpiryWorker when a reservation's TTL is exceeded. v2 adds customerId.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance (used for idempotency)

reservationId.description: ID of the reservation that expired

seatId.description: ID of the seat that was held by the expired reservation

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer who held the reservation (for notification routing)
